params.name: The King in Yellow
params.description: The King in Yellow is a play in two acts, with the first act being milder, while the second delivers a profound shock to the reader. It is a fountain of forbidden knowledge, chronicling a series of ambiguous and dreamlike plays. Whether one is a reader, an actor, or a spectator, they will slowly be dominated by the dreams sent by Hastur. The soul cannot sing, falling into endless madness.
